ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sustainability_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sustainability report */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department submitting the report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score received for the report */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score based on the criteria assessed */,
  "best_score" REAL /* Best score achieved across all assessments */,
  "reporting_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting period */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the report was submitted for */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sustainability_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to sustainability */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion being assessed */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the criterion based on importance */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the criterion during assessment */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., qualitative, quantitative) */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluating the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department assessment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being assessed */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment criteria */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned in this assessment */,
  "average" REAL /* Average score for this criterion among all reports */,
  "best" REAL /* Best score achieved for this criterion */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the evaluation team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_assessments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES sustainability_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_assessments_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES assessment_criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system (e.g., admin, reporter) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "reporting_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the sustainability metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholder_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement activity */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department conducting the engagement */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the engagement activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement took place */,
  "stakeholder_type" TEXT /* Type of stakeholder (e.g., investor, customer) */,
  "engagement_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the engagement activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholder_engagement_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement action */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report that prompted the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was implemented */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "responsible_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for implementing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvement_actions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES sustainability_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sustainability_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sustainability goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the sustainability goal */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for achieving the goal */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year by which the goal is to be achieved */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of progress toward the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply chain assessment */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of sustainability risk associated with the supplier */,
  "mitigation_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken to mitigate identified risks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_assessments_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department consuming energy */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where energy was consumed */,
  "consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of energy consumption */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy consumed (e.g., electricity, gas) */,
  "amount_consumed" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water usage record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department using water */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where water was used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of water usage */,
  "amount_used" REAL /* Amount of water used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste management record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department generating waste */,
  "waste_type" TEXT /* Type of waste (e.g., recyclable, non-recyclable) */,
  "management_date" TEXT /* Date of waste management */,
  "amount_managed" REAL /* Amount of waste managed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_management_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
